function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system. Handles various text encodings.

path.description: The path to the file to read.

function.name: read_multiple_files
function.description: Read the contents of multiple files in a single operation. Returns each file's contents along with its path.

paths.description: Array of file paths to read.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content.

function.name: edit_file
function.description: Make line-based edits to a text file. Each edit replaces an exact line sequence with new content.

dryRun.description: Preview changes using git-style diff format.

function.name: create_directory
function.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists. Creates parent directories as needed.

function.name: list_directory
function.description: List the contents of a directory. Distinguishes between files and directories with [FILE] and [DIR] prefixes.

function.name: directory_tree
function.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories as a JSON structure. Each entry includes name, type, and children.

function.name: move_file
function.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern. Case-insensitive substring match.

function.name: get_file_info
function.description: Retrieve detailed metadata about a file or directory including size, creation time, modification time, access time, type and permissions.

function.name: list_allowed_directories
function.description: Returns the list of directories that this server has been configured to access. Use this to understand which directories are available before accessing them.
